framework.name: CFCS ICS/OT Security Guidance
framework.name_nl: CFCS Vejledning om sikkerhed i industrielle kontrolsystemer
framework.scope: Security guidance for industrial control systems and operational technology in Danish critical infrastructure
framework.structure_description: Guidance organized by OT security domains: network isolation, remote access, vulnerability management, incident response, physical security, monitoring, supply chain, secure configuration, and personnel security.

controls.title: Separation of IT and OT networks
controls.description: Industrial control systems (ICS/OT) must be physically or logically separated from the corporate IT network. Traffic between zones must be controlled via dedicated firewalls.
controls.description_nl: Industrielle kontrolsystemer (ICS/OT) skal vaere fysisk eller logisk adskilt fra virksomhedens IT-netvaerk. Trafikken mellem zonerne skal kontrolleres via dedikerede firewalls.
controls.implementation_guidance: Implementer en demilitariseret zone (DMZ) mellem IT- og OT-netvaerk. Anvend unidirektionelle gateways hvor muligt.

controls.title: Unidirectional security gateways
controls.description: Where data must be transferred from OT to IT, unidirectional gateways (data diodes) must be used to prevent inbound traffic to the OT network.
controls.description_nl: Hvor data skal overfoeres fra OT til IT, skal der anvendes unidirektionelle gateways (data dioder) for at forhindre indgaende trafik til OT-netvaerket.

controls.title: OT network segmentation
controls.description: The OT network must be segmented into zones based on security level and functionality in accordance with IEC 62443.
controls.description_nl: OT-netvaerket skal segmenteres i zoner baseret pa sikkerhedsniveau og funktionalitet i henhold til IEC 62443.
controls.implementation_guidance: Definer zoner og conduits i henhold til IEC 62443-3-2. Dokumenter alle tilladte dataflow.

controls.title: Industrial firewalls
controls.description: Firewalls between OT zones must be industrially rated and configured specifically for industrial protocols.
controls.description_nl: Firewalls mellem OT-zoner skal vaere industriklassificerede og konfigureret specifikt til industrielle protokoller.

controls.title: Secure remote access to OT systems
controls.description: Remote access to OT systems must be limited to what is strictly necessary and must use dedicated, encrypted connections with multi-factor authentication.
controls.description_nl: Fjernadgang til OT-systemer skal begrenses til det absolut nodvendige og skal ske via dedikerede, krypterede forbindelser med flerfaktorautentifikation.
controls.implementation_guidance: Implementer dedikeret jump-server for OT-fjernadgang. Alle sessioner skal logges og overvaages.

controls.title: Time-limited remote access
controls.description: Remote access to OT systems must be time-limited and require explicit approval for each session.
controls.description_nl: Fjernadgang til OT-systemer skal vaere tidsbegraenset og kraeve eksplicit godkendelse for hver session.

controls.title: Vendor remote access to OT
controls.description: Vendors with remote access to OT systems must be individually approved. Access must be time-limited, monitored, and logged.
controls.description_nl: Leverandoerer med fjernadgang til OT-systemer skal godkendes individuelt. Adgangen skal vaere tidsbegraenset, overvaaget og logget.

controls.title: OT patching and update strategy
controls.description: The organization must have a documented strategy for patching OT systems that considers production availability and vendor recommendations.
controls.description_nl: Organisationen skal have en dokumenteret strategi for patching af OT-systemer der tager hensyn til produktionens tilgaengelighed og leverandoerens anbefalinger.
controls.implementation_guidance: Etabler et patchvinduesystem koordineret med driftstop. Test patches i testmiljoe foer produktion.

controls.title: Compensating controls for unpatched systems
controls.description: For OT systems that cannot be patched, compensating controls must be implemented such as network isolation, IDS, and application whitelisting.
controls.description_nl: For OT-systemer der ikke kan patches, skal der implementeres kompenserende kontroller sasom netvaerksisolering, IDS og applikationshvidlisting.

controls.title: Vulnerability scanning of OT systems
controls.description: Vulnerability scanning of OT systems must be performed with tools and methods approved for use in industrial environments.
controls.description_nl: Sarbarhedsscanning af OT-systemer skal udfoeres med vaerktojer og metoder der er godkendt til brug i industrielle miljoeerer.
controls.implementation_guidance: Anvend passive scanningsmetoder i produktionsmiljoeer. Aktiv scanning kun i vedligeholdelsesvinduer.

controls.title: OT-specific incident response plan
controls.description: The organization must have an incident response plan specifically for the OT environment that addresses both cyber and physical consequences.
controls.description_nl: Organisationen skal have en haendelsesresponsplan specifikt for OT-miljoeet der adresserer bade cyber- og fysiske konsekvenser.
controls.implementation_guidance: Inkluder OT-specifikke scenarier i haendelsesberedskabet. Koordiner med sikkerhedspersonale og driftspersonale.

controls.title: OT contingency exercises
controls.description: Contingency exercises for OT systems must be conducted at least annually and include scenarios involving cyber attacks on industrial control systems.
controls.description_nl: Beredskabsoevelser for OT-systemer skal gennemfoeres mindst arligt og inkludere scenarier med cyberangreb mod industrielle kontrolsystemer.

controls.title: OT forensic capability
controls.description: The organization must have the capability to collect and preserve digital evidence from OT systems after a security incident.
controls.description_nl: Organisationen skal have kapabilitet til at indsamle og bevare digitalt bevismateriale fra OT-systemer efter en sikkerhedshaendelse.

controls.title: Physical access control to OT facilities
controls.description: Physical access to OT facilities and control rooms must be restricted and controlled with electronic access management and logging.
controls.description_nl: Fysisk adgang til OT-anlaeg og kontrolrum skal begrenses og kontrolleres med elektronisk adgangsstyring og logning.

controls.title: Protection of remote installations
controls.description: Remote installations such as pump stations and transformer stations must be physically protected with alarms, surveillance, and tamper detection.
controls.description_nl: Fjaerninstallationer som pumpestationer og transformerstationer skal beskyttes fysisk med alarmer, overvagning og manipulationsdetektering.

controls.title: Intrusion detection in OT networks
controls.description: Intrusion detection systems (IDS) specifically configured for industrial protocols and communication patterns must be implemented.
controls.description_nl: Der skal implementeres indtraaengningsdetekteringssystemer (IDS) specifikt konfigureret til industrielle protokoller og kommunikationsmoenstre.
controls.implementation_guidance: Anvend OT-specifikke IDS der forstar industrielle protokoller som Modbus, DNP3, OPC UA og IEC 61850.

controls.title: Anomaly detection in process data
controls.description: Process data from OT systems must be monitored for anomalies that may indicate manipulation or cyber attacks.
controls.description_nl: Procesdata fra OT-systemer skal overvaages for anomalier der kan indikere manipulation eller cyberangreb.

controls.title: OT logging and audit trail
controls.description: All configuration changes, operator actions, and security events in OT systems must be logged in a central and protected log archive.
controls.description_nl: Alle konfigurationsaendringer, operatoerhandlinger og sikkerhedshaendelser i OT-systemer skal logges i et centralt og beskyttet logarkiv.

controls.title: Verification of OT components
controls.description: All hardware and software components for OT systems must be verified for integrity and authenticity before installation.
controls.description_nl: Alle hardware- og softwarekomponenter til OT-systemer skal verificeres for integritet og autenticitet foer installation.

controls.title: Security requirements for OT vendors
controls.description: Contracts with OT vendors must contain specific security requirements including requirements for vulnerability handling, patch delivery, and incident reporting.
controls.description_nl: Kontrakter med OT-leverandoerer skal indeholde specifikke sikkerhedskrav herunder krav til sarbarhedshandtering, patchlevering og incidentrapportering.

controls.title: Hardening of OT systems
controls.description: OT systems must be hardened by disabling unnecessary services, ports, and protocols. Default credentials must be changed.
controls.description_nl: OT-systemer skal haerdes ved at deaktivere unoedvendige tjenester, porte og protokoller. Standardadgangskoder skal aendres.
controls.implementation_guidance: Anvend leverandoerens haerdningsguider og CIS ICS benchmarks. Dokumenter alle afvigelser.

controls.title: Application whitelisting
controls.description: On OT systems, application whitelisting must be implemented so only approved programs can run.
controls.description_nl: Pa OT-systemer skal der implementeres applikationshvidlisting sa kun godkendte programmer kan koeres.

controls.title: OT configuration backup
controls.description: Configurations for all OT systems including PLC programs, HMI configurations, and network settings must be backed up regularly.
controls.description_nl: Konfigurationer for alle OT-systemer inklusiv PLC-programmer, HMI-konfigurationer og netvaerksindstillinger skal sikkerhedskopieres regelmaeessigt.
controls.implementation_guidance: Opbevar OT-backups offline eller i et separat sikkerhedsdomaene. Test gendannelse kvartalsmaeessigt.

controls.title: OT cybersecurity training
controls.description: All personnel with access to OT systems must receive specialized cybersecurity training for industrial control systems.
controls.description_nl: Alt personale med adgang til OT-systemer skal modtage specialiseret cybersikkerhedstraening for industrielle kontrolsystemer.
controls.implementation_guidance: Inkluder OT-specifikke emner: ICS-trusler, sikker fjernbetjening, haendelsesrapportering i OT-miljoeer.

controls.title: Security awareness for OT operators
controls.description: OT operators must be trained to recognize signs of cyber attacks in process data and system behavior.
controls.description_nl: OT-operatoerer skal traenes i at genkende tegn pa cyberangreb i processdata og systemopfoersel.

metadata.source: CFCS vejledning om sikkerhed i industrielle kontrolsystemer
